mapper.sql: p.id, p.title, p.slug, p.summary, p.cover_image, p.content, p.status, p.allow_comment, p.featured, p.view_count, p.published_at, p.category_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, c.name AS category_name, c.slug AS category_slug
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM posts p INNER JOIN post_tags pt ON pt.post_id = p.id WHERE pt.tag_id = #{tagId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM posts p INNER JOIN post_tags pt ON pt.post_id = p.id WHERE pt.tag_id = #{tagId} AND p.status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE slug = #{slug}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE slug = #{slug} AND id != #{id}

SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.status = #{status} AND p.featured = 1 ORDER BY p.published_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.status = #{status} ORDER BY p.published_at DESC, p.updated_at DESC

SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE p.slug = #{slug} AND p.status = #{status} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM posts p INNER JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( title, slug, summary, cover_image, content, status, allow_comment, featured, view_count, published_at, category_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{slug}, #{summary}, #{coverImage}, #{content}, #{status}, #{allowComment}, #{featured}, #{viewCount}, #{publishedAt}, #{categoryId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, slug = #{slug}, summary = #{summary}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, allow_comment = #{allowComment}, featured = #{featured}, view_count = #{viewCount}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, category_id = #{categoryId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
